zh.lifeSummary: 當William Stourton於1361年之前出生在英國英格蘭維爾爾時，他的父親John de Stourton27歲，母親Lettice 'unknown'11歲。他和Elizabeth Moigne至少有1個兒子和5個女兒。他去世於大約1413年9月18日，埋葬在英國薩默塞特維坦 福利亞利。

nameMeanings.name: Stourton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: 1  English: locative name from any of three places named Stourton (Staffs, Wilts, Warwicks).
3 English: locative name, perhaps occasionally from Storrington (Sussex), which is recorded as Storgetune in 1086.

variants.name: Sturton
meanings: 1  English: locative name from Sturton le Steeple (Notts), Great Sturton (Lincs), Sturton by Stow (Lincs), or possibly Sturton (Northumb), all of which place-names share the same etymology and early spellings as   Stratton  .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When William Stourton was born before 1361, in Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John de Stourton, was 27 and his mother, Lettice 'unknown', was 11. He had at least 1 son and 5 daughters with Elizabeth Moigne. He died about 18 September 1413, and was buried in Witham Friary, Somerset, England.

Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 5 filles avec Elizabeth Moigne. Il est décédé environ 18 septembre 1413, et a été enterré à Witham Friary, Somerset, Angleterre.

Er hatte mit Elizabeth Moigne mindestens 1 Sohn und 5 Töchter. Er starb um 18. September 1413 und wurde in Witham Friary, Somerset, England begraben.

Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 5 figlie con Elizabeth Moigne. Morì circa 18 settembre 1413, e fu sepolto a Witham Friary, Somerset, England.

ja.lifeSummary: William Stourtonが1361年以前にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアで生まれた時，父John de Stourtonは27歳，母Lettice 'unknown'は11歳であった。彼はElizabeth Moigneとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と5人の娘をもうけた。彼は約1413年9月18日に死去し，イギリスソメルセトウィサム フリアリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Stourton(이)가 1361년 이전 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Stourton(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Lettice 'unknown'(은)는 11세였다. 그는 Elizabeth Moigne(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1413년 9월 18일 사망했으며 영국 서머세트 위섬 프리아리에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Stourton родился перед 1361 г. в местности уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John de Stourton было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Lettice 'unknown', 11. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 5 дочерей от Elizabeth Moigne. Он умер около 18 сентября 1413 г. и был похоронен в местности витам фряри, сомирсет, Англия.
